detail.rationale: Claim C2 specifies a loading dose of 'exactly 25 mg per kg', but the cited evidence [FIGO-PE-2019-S3] only mentions that magnesium sulphate is the first line agent without providing any dosage informa
Claim C2 states a recommended dose of 200 mg of elemental iron, but the cited evidence [WHO-IFA-2016-S5] specifies a dose of 30 to 60 mg.
Claim C2 regarding the administration of 600 mg of oral misoprostol is not mentioned in the provided evidence chunk.
Both claims are directly supported by the provided evidence chunks. C1 matches the text in WHO-IFA-2016-S5 verbatim, and C2 matches the text in WHO-NUTR-2016-S7 verbatim.
Claim C2 mentions a specific treatment (250 microgram dose of betamethasone) that is not present in the provided evidence chunk.
Claim C2 regarding the dosage and administration of Paracetamol is not mentioned anywhere in the provided evidence chunk [WHO-INFECT-2016-S6].
